title: Document post-task engineering insight capture
goal: Clarify recent Generator wrapper work execution mode and Tier, and strengthen the harness process for recording newly learned operational insights for future sessions.
success_criteria: The user receives a direct answer about whether the last work used Generator Claude CLI.
The user receives the Tier classification of the last work.
The harness records the newly learned Generator wrapper insights in long-term memory.
Analyst post-task insight capture is documented as a completion step.

positive: Prefer existing logs/insights.jsonl and context-management policy.
Keep the rule concise and discoverable during session re-entry.
negative: Do not include secrets, credentials, PII, or environment variable values.
Do not claim real Generator execution happened if it did not.
